---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

TrinityMetrics explores how AI can be used in regulated clinical and pharmacometric workflows without obscuring reasoning, responsibility, or data integrity.

## Authors

* [Andy Stein](https://sites.google.com/site/andrewsteinphd/home)

## Audience

The primary audience includes:

- pharmacometricians
- biostatisticians
- statistical programmers
- clinical data scientists

## Project status

This is an early-stage working repository.

The goal is to build a useful collection of writing, code, examples, and reusable workflow patterns over time.
